item.title: Test Post
item.description:
This is the first paragraph of my post. Some introductory text before the image.

{{< carousel >}} fly_agaric_upscale.jpg DSD_0190.jpg fez_ray_upscale_levels.jpg {{< /carousel >}}

And here is some text that follows the image. You can write as much Markdown as you like here.
